ac_verdicts.ac_text: Package name @repo/pipeline-queue confirmed. Build: tsc exits 0.
PipelineJobDataSchema is a discriminated union on 'stage' with 5 variants: elaboration, story-creation, implementation, review, qa. Zod schema confirmed. 14 schema tests pass.

createPipelineQueue wraps Queue with PipelineJobDataSchema.parse() at enqueue. defaultJobOptions: attempts=3, backoff.type=exponential, backoff.delay=1000ms. ZodError thrown before bullQueue.add is called on invalid data.
enableOfflineQueue: false confirmed. No lazyConnect confirmed. No singleton — new connection per call confirmed. maxRetriesPerRequest: null confirmed (required by BullMQ v5+).
PIPELINE_QUEUE_NAME = 'apip-pipeline'. Test explicitly asserts this value. Exported as stable contract.
README contains full Bull Board mount instructions with createBullBoard, BullMQAdapter, ExpressAdapter code example. Note that Bull Board is not bundled — consumers install separately.
pnpm --filter @repo/pipeline-queue test exits 0. 14 schema tests + 16 factory tests. Independently verified.

Integration test exists with test.skipIf(!process.env.REDIS_URL) guard. Two integration tests: enqueue/dequeue round-trip with PipelineJobDataSchema validation, and Zod rejection before enqueue. Tests skip cleanly without REDIS_URL.
Both pnpm type-check and pnpm test exit 0. Independently verified.
Package name is @repo/pipeline-queue. pnpm-workspace.yaml includes packages/backend/* wildcard. Package builds to dist/index.js with correct exports field in package.json.

README documents: queue name (apip-pipeline), PipelineJobDataSchema discriminated union, two-connection model (separate connections for Queue and Worker), AOF persistence requirement, ElastiCache notes. All elements present.
